content: Analyzing the ticket to understand the problem space and existing codebase context...
export interface User { id: string; name: string; }

## Problem Statement

This ticket addresses the need for a user authentication flow in the application. Currently, there is no mechanism for users to log in or manage their sessions.

## Solution

We will implement a token-based authentication system using JWT tokens stored in secure HTTP-only cookies. The solution includes:

- Login endpoint with credential validation
- Session management with automatic token refresh
- Logout with token invalidation

## Scope

### In Scope
- Login/logout endpoints
- JWT token generation and validation
- Session persistence

### Out of Scope
- OAuth/social login
- Multi-factor authentication
- Password reset flow
